---
title: "About Me"
---

Write a short biography here.

Include:

-   Educational background
-   Professional interests
-   Technical skills
-   Career goals

## Education

Master of Applied Economics and Data Science, University of Pennsylvania (expaceted 2027) Batelor of Science, University Name 2026

## Interests

-   Econometrics
-   Machine Learning
-   Data Analysis

## Contact

## student\@email.edu

------------------------------------------------------------------------
